summary: Tested structural refactoring of Jasper Legal Tech platform (iteration 42). Server.py monolith broken into modular FastAPI structure with extracted modules: db.py, models.py, auth.py, storage.py, routes/auth_routes.py, routes/attorney_routes.py. All 20 backend API tests pass (100%). All frontend pages load correctly without errors.

issues: Minor React hydration warning about <span> inside <option> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

frontend_pages.landing_page: PASS - All sections render (hero, how it works, attorneys, pricing, FAQ)
frontend_pages.login_page: PASS - Role selection (client/attorney) + login form works
frontend_pages.dashboard_us_pro: PASS - Cases, risk score, findings, battle preview, score history render
frontend_pages.dashboard_belgium_pro: PASS - French interface, Belgium jurisdiction, all sections render
frontend_pages.upload_page: PASS - Document upload, scanner, context input all visible
frontend_pages.settings_page: PASS - Account, Plan & billing, Risk Monitor, Notifications, Privacy tabs work
frontend_pages.document_library: PASS - Generate document mode with categories visible
frontend_pages.legal_chat: PASS - James chat interface with suggested questions
frontend_pages.attorney_dashboard: PASS - Metrics, upcoming calls, recent activity, navigation all work

modular_structure_verified.db_module: PASS - MongoDB connection shared across all modules
modular_structure_verified.models_module: PASS - Pydantic models (User, Case, Document, etc.) working
modular_structure_verified.auth_module: PASS - hash_password, verify_password, get_current_user, create_session_response working

critical_code_review_comments: Modular structure correctly implemented - auth_router and attorney_router properly included via api_router.include_router()
Shared imports (db, models, auth, storage) working correctly across modules
Cookie-based auth with session_token working for all user types
All endpoints that were in server.py still work after refactoring
Minor: Settings.js has React hydration warning about <span> inside <option> - cosmetic only
context_for_next_testing_agent: Structural refactoring tested and verified. Server.py reduced from 6512 to 5161 lines. Extracted modules: db.py (MongoDB connection), models.py (Pydantic models), auth.py (auth helpers), storage.py (object storage), routes/auth_routes.py (auth endpoints), routes/attorney_routes.py (attorney portal). All endpoints working. No feature changes - purely structural refactoring verified successful.
